register.title: Standard registration
register.password_info: Your password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit.

errors.password_error: The password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit.

register.success_message: Your account has been created. Use the confirmation link sent by email to activate it.
register.created_toast: Account created. Check your email to confirm it.

confirm.title: Account confirmation
confirm.subtitle: We are validating your account activation link.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.description: Choose a new password to secure your account.

modal.title: Sign in or create your account
modal.subtitle: Use your account to prepare future personalized park features while keeping the experience simple.
